# SCORE Services: Mentoring, Education, and Online Resources

> BOSS Libraries public routing record. Use it to find the right source, link, organization, or person.

## Description

SCORE services slide presenting three routes: free confidential mentoring, webinars and on-demand courses, and an online library of guides, templates, checklists, videos, and articles.

## When to surface

Surface when the user is deciding whether they need a mentor, self-paced education, a live webinar, or a practical template.

## Key information

- SCORE mentoring is described as free and confidential, in person or remote.
- Education includes live webinars, recordings, and self-paced courses.
- The online resource library includes guides, templates, checklists, blogs, videos, and infographics.

## People and links

- Organizations: SCORE

## Next handoff

Route to the matching live SCORE service page and avoid implying that the librarian itself is the mentor.

## Guardrails

- The BOSS Libraries Librarian retrieves and routes information; it is not a mentor or a substitute for a qualified professional.

## Original document

Use **View original** in the BOSS Library to open or download the approved public source.
